- **Pronunciation:** `BAKALAG`
- **Part of speech:** verb
- **Definition:** to backlog work, order pending tasks, or preserve uncompleted obligations for planning
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** technology-software, ai-cognition, media-communication
- **Root family:** `BKLG`; Technology; backlog, ordered pending work; backlog, ordered uncompleted work held for prioritization, planning, and accountability
- **Pattern:** verb
- **Literal:** B-K-L-G root, action vowel a
- **Example:** Na bakalag.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `BAKAPAG-GA`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** ongoing process, practice, or craft of: to keep books, record accounts, or preserve financial memory
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `BKPG`; Law/civic life; bookkeeping, account memory; bookkeeping, disciplined financial records, accounts kept so exchange can be remembered
- **Pattern:** process
- **Literal:** B-K-P-G root, process suffix -ga
- **Example:** Bakapag-ga ga ban rih.
- **Corpus:** observed (2 attestations); tracks: technical-software; examples in tech-797

## bakapak

- **Example:** Nel pat ad balanak-wed.

- **Pronunciation:** `BALATAX-DA`
- **Part of speech:** civic/legal term
- **Definition:** ballot record or election custody log
- **Register/status:** civic; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place

- **Pattern:** civic
- **Literal:** B-L-T-X root, public/legal suffix -da
- **Example:** Pu balatax-da.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** ongoing process, practice, or craft of: to sweep with a broom, clear floor, or gather scattered dust
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Domains:** daily-life, technology-software, art-beauty, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `BRMX`; Building/making; broom, sweeping tool; broom, sweeping tool, hand-held order for dust and floor
- **Pattern:** process
- **Literal:** B-R-M-X root, process suffix -ga
- **Example:** Baramax-ga ga ban rih.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `BATAHAC-DOV`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** vow, oath, or pledged obligation concerning: batch processing, grouped work
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** technology-software, ai-cognition, media-communication
- **Root family:** `BTHC`; Technology; batch processing, grouped work; batch processing, grouped work handled together for efficiency, review, or training
- **Pattern:** vow
- **Literal:** B-T-H-C root, vow suffix -dov
- **Example:** Na dov batahac-dov.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `BAYAX-LEM`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** collective body, guild, or people organized around: bee, pollinating insect
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** nature-ecology, travel-place, science-math
- **Root family:** `BYX`; Nature; bee, pollinating insect; bee, pollinating insect, hive work, honeyed provision
- **Pattern:** collective
- **Literal:** B-Y-X root, collective suffix -lem
- **Example:** Bayax-lem lem pu nam.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)
